fields_json: {"name":"Shannon Perry","bio":"Sports physical therapist and volunteer head track coach at Crestwood High in Birmingham. Writes about sprint mechanics, return-to-sport, and the runner's life."}
{"name":"Demetrius Washington","bio":"Assistant track coach and math teacher at Crestwood High. Guest contributor on jumps, relays, and team culture."}

{"title":"Sprint mechanics: cleaning up the first three steps","slug":"sprint-mechanics-first-three-steps","body":"The block start is where most high school sprinters leave time on the track. We break down shin angle, arm drive, and patience out of the blocks.","author":{"sys":{"type":"Link","linkType":"Entry","id":"entry-author-shannon"}},"heroImage":{"sys":{"type":"Link","linkType":"Asset","id":"asset-sprintfilm-001"}},"published":true}

{"title":"Returning to sprinting after an ACL tear","slug":"return-to-sport-after-acl-tear","body":"Coming back from an ACL reconstruction is about more than clearance. Here is the criteria-based progression I use with athletes before they touch a starting block again.","author":{"sys":{"type":"Link","linkType":"Entry","id":"entry-author-shannon"}},"heroImage":{"sys":{"type":"Link","linkType":"Asset","id":"asset-clinic-001"}},"published":true}

{"title":"My coaching philosophy: discipline over hype","slug":"coaching-philosophy-discipline-over-hype","body":"Talent gets you to the meet. Habits win the meet. Why I build our Crestwood program around boring fundamentals done consistently.","author":{"sys":{"type":"Link","linkType":"Entry","id":"entry-author-shannon"}},"heroImage":{"sys":{"type":"Link","linkType":"Asset","id":"asset-practice-001"}},"published":true}

{"title":"Birmingham running routes I keep coming back to","slug":"birmingham-running-routes","body":"From the Crestwood South loop at 5:15 AM to Vulcan Trail and the Lakeshore path, here are the routes that get me through a marathon build.","author":{"sys":{"type":"Link","linkType":"Entry","id":"entry-author-shannon"}},"heroImage":{"sys":{"type":"Link","linkType":"Asset","id":"asset-route-001"}},"published":true}

{"title":"Meal prep for a coach who runs at dawn","slug":"meal-prep-for-a-coach-who-runs","body":"Smoked chicken on Sunday, rice and greens through Wednesday, a real plate of BBQ on the weekend. How I fuel back-to-back early mornings without living on gas-station food.","author":{"sys":{"type":"Link","linkType":"Entry","id":"entry-author-shannon"}},"heroImage":{"sys":{"type":"Link","linkType":"Asset","id":"asset-bbq-001"}},"published":true}

{"title":"Faith, the choir, and running on Sunday afternoons","slug":"faith-choir-and-running-on-sundays","body":"Why New Hope AME, the men's choir, and a quiet Sunday long run are the rhythm that keeps the rest of my week honest.","author":{"sys":{"type":"Link","linkType":"Entry","id":"entry-author-shannon"}},"heroImage":{"sys":{"type":"Link","linkType":"Asset","id":"asset-route-002"}},"published":true}

{"title":"Devon's recruiting journey: the unofficial visit","slug":"devon-recruiting-journey-unofficial-visit","body":"Following one of our D1 prospects through film, calls, and a December campus visit. What the recruiting process actually looks like for a Crestwood sprinter.","author":{"sys":{"type":"Link","linkType":"Entry","id":"entry-author-shannon"}},"heroImage":{"sys":{"type":"Link","linkType":"Asset","id":"asset-spotlight-devon"}},"published":true}

{"title":"Half marathon training log: building for Mercedes-Benz weekend","slug":"half-marathon-training-log-mercedes-benz","body":"Twelve weeks of mileage, tempo work, and long runs leading into the Birmingham half. What worked, what I cut, and the splits I am chasing.","author":{"sys":{"type":"Link","linkType":"Entry","id":"entry-author-shannon"}},"heroImage":{"sys":{"type":"Link","linkType":"Asset","id":"asset-race-001"}},"published":true}

{"title":"Relay handoffs: the exchange zone is won in practice","slug":"relay-handoffs-exchange-zone","body":"Demetrius breaks down how we drill the 4x100 exchange until it stops being a guessing game.","author":{"sys":{"type":"Link","linkType":"Entry","id":"entry-author-demetrius"}},"heroImage":{"sys":{"type":"Link","linkType":"Asset","id":"asset-practice-002"}},"published":true}

{"title":"Hamstring strains: prevention beats rehab","slug":"hamstring-strains-prevention","body":"Sprinters live and die by their hamstrings. The eccentric and tempo work I put in our warmups to keep athletes on the track.","author":{"sys":{"type":"Link","linkType":"Entry","id":"entry-author-shannon"}},"heroImage":{"sys":{"type":"Link","linkType":"Asset","id":"asset-clinic-002"}},"published":true}

{"title":"Devon Mitchell — senior sprinter, D1 prospect","event":"100m / 200m","summary":"Crestwood senior and team captain. Personal bests of 10.6 in the 100 and 21.4 in the 200, with college coaches calling."}
{"title":"Trey Dawson — 400m and 4x400 anchor","event":"400m","summary":"Junior quarter-miler who anchors our 4x400. Dropped two seconds off his open 400 over the winter."}
{"title":"Kayla Simmons — hurdles and long jump","event":"100m hurdles / long jump","summary":"Sophomore multi-event athlete with the best three-step rhythm on the team. One to watch this season."}
{"title":"Off-season speed development","slug":"off-season-speed-development","level":"High school sprinters"}
{"title":"Return-to-sport progression after lower-limb injury","slug":"return-to-sport-progression","level":"Post-rehab athletes"}
{"title":"Beginner half marathon plan","slug":"beginner-half-marathon-plan","level":"Recreational runners"}

{"title":"Crestwood track season opener","venue":"Crestwood High School","recap":"Cold and windy, but the sprint group looked sharp. Devon opened in 10.8 into a headwind and the 4x100 ran clean exchanges."}

{"title":"Mercedes-Benz Marathon weekend half","venue":"Downtown Birmingham","recap":"Ran the half through downtown and Highland Park. Negative-split the back half and held it together up the last hill on 20th."}

{"title":"Crestwood Cross Country Invitational","venue":"Oak Mountain State Park","recap":"Tough rolling course at Oak Mountain. The team packed up well through the middle mile and we moved three runners into the top twenty."}
{"title":"Saturday long run — Lakeshore to Vulcan","miles":"10","notes":"Easy 10 at 8:05 pace. Legs felt heavy the first three miles, then settled in. Cold start, sunny finish."}
{"title":"Tempo Tuesday — Crestwood South loop","miles":"7","notes":"3 mile warmup, 4 at half-marathon effort, felt controlled. Dark and 38 degrees at 5:15."}
{"title":"Recovery shakeout before XC invite","miles":"4","notes":"Easy shakeout with the team the day before Oak Mountain. Strides at the end, everyone bouncy."}
{"title":"Long run with Demetrius — Red Mountain","miles":"9","notes":"Met Demetrius for a hilly 9 over Red Mountain. Good conversation pace, talked through the spring schedule."}
